tutorial.title: Tutorial
tutorial.text:
Hand: double-tap or drag to Field to play.
Field: double-tap or drag to Hand to recall.
Single tap does nothing.

settings.title: Settings
settings.text: Double-tap or drag to Field — language settings and reset only.

language_settings.title: Language Settings
language_settings.text: Drag to Field — get language cards in Hand.

lang_en.title: English
lang_en.text: Drag to Field — UI and cards in English.

lang_zh.title: 中文
lang_zh.text: Drag to Field — display in Chinese.

highlight_on.title: Highlight On
highlight_on.text: Drag to Field — show play hints on key cards.

highlight_off.title: Highlight Off
highlight_off.text: Drag to Field — hide play hints.

reset_world.title: Reset Cards
reset_world.text: Drag to Field — restore starter world and clear save.

world_controller.title: World Controller
world_controller.text: Drag to Field to bootstrap the world.

starter_deck.title: Backpack
starter_deck.text: Recall to hand: field clears. Play to field: pour items, then close to restore.

guide_weave_1.title: Weave 1
guide_weave_1.text: You are the first Binder. Drag World Controller to the Field.

guide_weave_2.title: Weave 2
guide_weave_2.text: After bootstrap, drag Door to Field to play it.

guide_weave_3.title: Weave 3
guide_weave_3.text: Drag Door to Field to play. Use the backpack to stash cards.

guide_weave_4.title: Weave 4
guide_weave_4.text: Tap any card to read it large. Take cards Field→Hand anytime.

guide_weave_5.title: Weave 5
guide_weave_5.text: Open Settings for fullscreen, language, and highlights.

load_error.title: Load Error
load_error.text: Could not load game data. Check your connection and refresh.

shop_script.title: Shop Script
shop_script.text: Drag to Field — highlights each card you should play, one at a time.

back.title: Back
back.text: Drag to Field — return to the world.

music_console.title: Music Console
music_console.text: Double-tap — open HarmonyForge tools (like the music site header).

music_tool_studio.title: HarmonyForge
music_tool_studio.text: Recall to Hand, play — full arranger (sequencer + timeline).

music_tool_works.title: Works Repo
music_tool_works.text: Play — embed HarmonyForge; use top bar «Works Repo».

music_tool_store.title: Publish Store
music_tool_store.text: Play — embed HarmonyForge; use top bar «Publish Store».

music_tool_drafts.title: Draft Station
music_tool_drafts.text: Play — embed HarmonyForge; use top bar «Draft Station».

music_tool_battle.title: Beat Battle
music_tool_battle.text: Play — open Beat Battle review site in a new tab.

art_tool_pixel.title: Pixel Board
art_tool_pixel.text: Recall to Hand, double-tap to edit. Export to Works, or Apply to save on this card.

art_tool_gallery.title: Art Shop
art_tool_gallery.text: Double-tap — browse shop, download, edit; manage local works and drafts.

music_embed.hint_studio: Arrange patterns and timeline; Publish / Works / Store / Drafts are in the top bar.
music_embed.hint_works: In the embedded app, tap «Works Repo» in the header to manage your cloud tracks.
music_embed.hint_store: In the embedded app, tap «Publish Store» to browse and load community projects.
music_embed.hint_drafts: In the embedded app, tap «Draft Station» for local draft backups.

art_editor.title: Pixel Board
art_editor.hint: 35×25 (7:5) canvas; auto local draft; undo/redo. Cloud built-in like Beat-Battle.

art_works.title: Art Shop
art_works.hint: Like Beat-Battle library: browse cloud works, download or edit in the pixel board.
art_works.empty: No works yet — paint and Export.
art_works.shop_empty: Shop is empty — use Upload in the editor.
art_works.drafts_empty: No named drafts — use Save draft in the editor.
